notableEvents.label: Tyler Stephenson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Stephenson grounds into a double play, pitcher Kai-Wei Teng to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. JJ Bleday out at 2nd. Tyler Stephenson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz steals (9) 3rd base.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Zach Dezenzo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach Dezenzo pops out to second baseman Matt McLain.
